title: rhododendron arboreum subsp. kingianum
intro: Rhododendron arboreum subsp. kingianum, also known as the King's rose or King's rhododendron, is a flowering plant species that is a subspecies of the rhododendron arboreum. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron arboreum subsp. kingianum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
